# Mia's Tiny Treasures

> A warm, home-based daycare for infants and toddlers in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, run by Marissa — a Lead Infant Teacher with 15+ years of experience, CPR certified, mandatory reporter trained, and University of Iowa graduate (B.S. Sociology, ASL minor).

Mia's Tiny Treasures is named after Marissa's daughter, Mia. The program is built around small group sizes, play-based learning, and deep family connection. Every family receives daily updates via a shared Google Doc covering meals, naps, diapering, activities, milestones, and photos.

## About the Program

- **Ages served:** Infants and toddlers only
- **Location:** Cedar Rapids, Iowa (exact address shared after tour is scheduled)
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 7:00 AM – 5:30 PM; closed weekends
- **Group size:** Intentionally small so every child receives real, devoted attention
- **Caregiver credentials:** CPR certified, mandatory reporter, universal precautions training, B.S. Sociology (University of Iowa), ASL minor

## Philosophy

Marissa believes childhood isn't something to rush through — it's something to treasure. Her program focuses on responsive care, age-appropriate play, sensory exploration, creativity, outdoor adventures, and building confidence and independence. Parents stay connected through daily communication and updates.

## Enrollment

Families interested in enrolling can submit an inquiry on the homepage. Marissa responds within one business day to schedule a visit.

## Contact

- **Website:** https://loganwoodxyz.github.io/mersite/
- **Location:** Cedar Rapids, Iowa
